itinerary.title: Shimla Heritage & Ancient Temples
itinerary.description: Arrive in Shimla, the former summer capital. Walk the historic Mall Road and visit Jakhoo Temple for panoramic mountain views.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali via Kullu Valley
itinerary.description: Enjoy a scenic drive to Manali, passing through the beautiful Kullu Valley along the Beas River, stopping for local shawl shopping.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley Adventure Sports
itinerary.description: Excursion to Solang Valley. Enjoy thrilling adventure activities such as paragliding, zorbing, and quad biking, or skiing in winter.

itinerary.title: Manali to Dharamshala & McLeod Ganj
itinerary.description: Drive to Dharamshala, the seat of the Tibetan government in exile. Visit the Tsuglagkhang Complex (Dalai Lama Temple) in McLeod Ganj.

itinerary.title: Dharamshala to Dalhousie & Khajjiar
itinerary.description: Travel to Dalhousie and take an excursion to Khajjiar, known as the 'Mini Switzerland of India', surrounded by dense pine forests.

itinerary.title: Kasauli Orchards & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive through Kasauli's peaceful apple orchards. Transfer to the nearest airport or station for your onward flight.

title: Himachal: Scenic Alpine Escapes
description: Escape to the majestic heights of the Himalayas on a journey through Himachal Pradesh's most picturesque valleys and hill stations. Walk the colonial lanes of Shimla, experience high altitude adventure sports in Solang Valley, and breathe in the spiritual serenity of Dharamshala and McLeod Ganj. From the apple orchards of Kasauli to the breathtaking pine forested meadows of Dalhousie and Khajjiar, often called Mini Switzerland, this alpine retreat is a paradise for adventurers and nature lovers alike.
highlights: Breathtaking hikes and adventure sports in the valleys of Manali and Kullu
Explore colonial heritage and panoramic views on the historic Shimla Ridge
Visit the spiritual monasteries of Dharamshala and McLeod Ganj
Discover the pine-forested meadows of Dalhousie and Khajjiar
Thrilling paragliding, zorbing, and winter skiing in Solang Valley
Stroll through the tranquil, lush apple orchards of Kasauli
